name: recent-funding-rounds
description: Find companies that raised funding recently via Fundable (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router). Search recent deals by date range, round type, deal size, industry, and sort order — all through the SELAT routed payment rail.

dateStart.description: Start of the funding-deal window (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). For 'last week' use 7 days before today; for 'last month' use 30 days before.

dateEnd.description: End of the funding-deal window (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Typically today.

financingType.description: Round type to filter on, e.g. SEED, SERIES_A through SERIES_M, SAFE, CONVERTIBLE_NOTE, EQUITY, GRANT, FUNDING_ROUND.

industry.description: Industry permalink to filter companies, e.g. artificial-intelligence, fintech-e067.

sortBy.description: Sort order: most_recent_raise, largest_total_raise, most_funding_rounds, most_investors.

pageSize.description: Results per page, 1-100. Larger pages cost more credits.

steps.label: recent funding rounds — Fundable /companies search (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
